text:
Sorry, I was not remembering correctly.
I upgraded to r13683 on Aug. 19th and today I come back here to add the comment.
But I have just tried to rebuild the port again and I'm still getting the same error.
So I think that even for the upgrade to r13683 I forced the removal of devel/xxhash, I just wasn't remembering that.
Sorry again.
